message:
test(search-core): add 11 tests for consistency and reindex system

Expand consistency.rs from 20 to 31 tests covering:
- ConsistencyConfig: default threshold (0.05)
- ReindexConfig: default values (batch_size=500, checkpoint=true)
- NoProgress: callable without panic
- ConsistencyReport: serde roundtrip, zero errors/warnings count
- Index-more-than-DB orphan detection (80% drift → Error)
- Checkpoint with success=true but missing completion_ts
  (Warning severity path)
- TrackingProgress: records (indexed, total) pairs
- Full reindex with Project scope variant
- Severity sort ordering (Error < Warning < Info)
- ReindexResult elapsed_ms sanity bound

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
